Appearances:
Plaintiff JOHN STEWART COMPANY, is present. Represented by
Attorney JOHN ZHANGI, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant ANDREA PLAYER, is present.
Attorney RICHARD LOPATTO, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem BARBARA ANSCHER , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of JULY 5, 2011 is vacated.

.
